examples: Oh - I can't tell you the arguments my wife will have with me over these durn night lights!
One of the defendants, Franklin Durn, drives a Ferrari; in partnership with another, he owns a petrochemical firm which has contracts with PDVSA.
Nanterre mayor Jacqueline Fraysse, who survived as council colleagues slumped over dead around her, was appalled that Durn had been able to slip away so easily.
Prosecutors in Paris have opened an inquiry into Durn's death.
"I don't give a durn about it, " Frankie said.
